summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VenuLoQ Phase 12 — Event Execution Coordination + Closure Readiness. Backend: 45/45 tests passed. Frontend: All UI features verified including ExecutionDashboard with Today/Live/Issues/Blocked summary, 8 status filters; ExecutionDetail with 6 tabs (Handoff, Team, Prep, Event Day, Changes, Closure); all modals working; 9-status execution flow; incident handling with severity-based status changes; versioned addenda; 5-check closure gate.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>' - React hydration warning from dynamic option rendering, does not affect functionality

backend_execution_status.invalid_status_rejected: PASS - Returns 400 for invalid execution status
backend_execution_status.valid_statuses_accepted: PASS - All 9 statuses accepted (handoff_pending, assigned, in_preparation, ready_for_event, event_live, issue_active, event_completed, closure_note_pending, closure_ready)
backend_execution_status.creates_timeline_entry: PASS - Status update auto-creates milestone timeline entry

backend_event_day.returns_full_data: PASS - Returns event_day, timeline, incidents, open_incidents count
backend_event_day.timeline_all_types: PASS - All 7 timeline types work (note, setup, milestone, issue_raised, issue_resolved, customer_update, vendor_update)

backend_incidents.list_returns_data: PASS - Returns incidents array with total and open count
backend_incidents.create_success: PASS - Creates incident with incident_id, status=open
backend_incidents.high_severity_auto_issue_active: PASS - High/critical incident auto-sets execution_status to issue_active
backend_incidents.resolve_reverts_status: PASS - Resolving last severe incident reverts from issue_active to event_live
backend_incidents.all_incident_types: PASS - All 7 types accepted (vendor_issue, venue_issue, customer_issue, logistics_issue, quality_issue, safety_issue, other)
backend_incidents.all_severity_levels: PASS - All 4 severities accepted (low, medium, high, critical)

backend_addenda.create_requires_handoff: PASS - Returns 400 if no booking snapshot exists
backend_addenda.original_snapshot_immutable: PASS - Original booking_snapshot NEVER modified by addenda
backend_addenda.all_change_types: PASS - All 5 types accepted (customer_requirement, venue_change, commercial_change, schedule_change, special_requirement)

backend_event_completion.complete_success: PASS - Sets execution_status to event_completed, initializes closure with event_completed=true

backend_closure.get_5_checks: PASS - Returns 5 closure checks (event_completed, critical_issues_resolved, closure_note, post_event_tasks_done, change_history_intact)
backend_closure.close_requires_all_checks: PASS - Returns 400 if not all 5 checks passed
backend_closure.close_success: PASS - Sets execution_status to closure_ready when all checks pass

backend_dashboard_phase12.includes_execution_status: PASS - Dashboard items include execution_status field
backend_dashboard_phase12.includes_open_incidents: PASS - Dashboard items include open_incidents count
backend_dashboard_phase12.summary_phase12_counts: PASS - Summary includes today, event_live, issue_active, completed counts
backend_dashboard_phase12.sorting: PASS - Sorts: today first, then event_live, then issue_active, then approaching

critical_code_review_comments: execution.py: Well-structured 1276-line backend with clear 9-status execution model
execution.py: High/critical incident auto-sets status to issue_active, resolving reverts to event_live
execution.py: Addenda are versioned (v1, v2...) and NEVER modify original booking_snapshot
execution.py: Closure gate requires all 5 checks including non-empty closure_note
execution.py: Dashboard sorts: today first, then event_live, then issue_active, then approaching, then blocked
execution.py: Timeline entries auto-created for status changes, setup updates, incidents
ExecutionDashboard.js: Clean summary strip with Today/Live/Issues/Blocked metrics
ExecutionDashboard.js: 8 status filters including Phase 12 statuses (Live, Issue, Completed, Closed)
ExecutionDetail.js: Comprehensive 665-line component with 6 tabs and all Phase 12 modals
ExecutionDetail.js: 9-status flow visualization with numbered steps and checkmarks
ExecutionDetail.js: Closure tab correctly disables Close Event until all 5 checks pass

test_credentials.rm: rm1@venuloq.in / rm123 (role: rm - can manage own cases)
test_credentials.admin: admin@venuloq.in / admin123 (role: admin - can access all cases)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test lead lead_4f7a8e81c605 (Phase11 Test Wedding) which has full handoff, incidents, addendum, and is already closed. Created TEST_ prefixed incidents, timeline entries, and addenda during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 12 Event Execution Coordination fully tested. Backend endpoints at /api/execution/* all working. Frontend routes at /team/rm/execution (ExecutionDashboard) and /team/rm/execution/:leadId (ExecutionDetail). 9-status execution model: handoff_pending → assigned → in_preparation → ready_for_event → event_live → issue_active → event_completed → closure_note_pending → closure_ready. Incident types: vendor_issue, venue_issue, customer_issue, logistics_issue, quality_issue, safety_issue, other. Severities: low, medium, high, critical. Timeline types: note, setup, milestone, issue_raised, issue_resolved, customer_update, vendor_update. Addendum change_types: customer_requirement, venue_change, commercial_change, schedule_change, special_requirement. Closure checks: event_completed, critical_issues_resolved, closure_note, post_event_tasks_done, change_history_intact. Test lead lead_4f7a8e81c605 is fully closed with all Phase 12 data.

real_apis: All execution coordination endpoints are real (no mocking)
